title: Sleepless Additions
description: A Better-Than-Adventure addon that adds cool stuff.
body:
![Mod Content :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9c8b947a36e01eb77b9a374729d6096f9ba41d5.png)

Hello, welcome to our mod page! Sleepless Additions is a cool mod designed to be used alongside the Better-Than-Adventure mod for Beta 1.7.3

Here's some stuff we add;

![Wooden Slingshot :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aba7407a78c2f0a296e0600db87466b91c08d01.png)
The Slingshot; in wooden and steel flavours, pebble your friends till they can't take it anymore :3

![Ruby Gemstone Blehhhh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96d572abd2e7a02b41ac91b8221da5c9cae55eb0.png)
Ruby; a stylish red gem from an ancient era, fashion it into stylish and durable armor and tools, not green this time!

![Rubyy Toools :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a67cd8946a8dc2cf39acb6f25f46cbffbc6b326.png)

![Ruby Armor UGhhh shakes butt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/486a1c8fd96814ac9461efbbce2e576f5575eb77.png)


You'll need these two goobers if you wanna use this mod:

Halplibe https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/bta-halplibe

Terrain API: https://bta-modding.nouma-vallee.fr/Useless/terrainapi/
